name: Autumn Fruits with Sherry Sabayon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed cantaloupe and cut into thin slices. Peel the fruit.
2. Cut figs into wedges or halve strawberries.
3. In a double boiler over simmering water, whisk egg yolks and sugar until combined.
4. Gradually whisk in half of the sherry. Continue whisking until the mixture holds shape for 3 seconds when drizzled from the whisk, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool while stirring occasionally.
5. In a separate bowl, beat whipping cream until soft peaks form.
6. Fold the whipped cream into the sabayon with the remaining sherry and orange peel. Refrigerate until chilled.
7. To serve, arrange cantaloupe slices around the center of plates. Combine figs or strawberries and grapes in the center and mound them up slightly. Pour sauce over and sprinkle with toasted almonds.
Note: From Bon Appetit, October 1987.
